basic_details.job_title: Govt Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh House Surgeon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 37 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Govt. Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh (GMSH Chandigarh) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for House Surgeon posts! Published on the official Govt. Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh website, this new recruitment drive offers 37 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age limit of 30 years and possessing an M.B.B.S. degree from a recognized university along with completion of internship can apply through offline mode up to 15-06-2026. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 22-06-2026. Find all details about the GMSH Chandigarh House Surgeon new vacancy

qualification.education_qualification: M.B.B.S from recognized university and Internship completed
qualification.details: M.B.B.S from recognized university and Internship completed

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nrhmchd.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the House Surgeon posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the House Surgeon posts at Govt. Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh is 15-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the House Surgeon position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.B.B.S degree from a recognized university and have completed their internship to be eligible for the House Surgeon posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the House Surgeon recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the House Surgeon posts is 30 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the House Surgeon role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the House Surgeon position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 72072 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for House Surgeons?
faq.answer: Govt. Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh is recruiting for a total of 37 House Surgeon posts across various departments.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the House Surgeon posts?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates will be based on their academic merit and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. When is the walk-in date for document verification?
faq.answer: The walk-in for document verification is scheduled for 22-06-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Govt. Multi Specialty Hospital Chandigarh, which is www.nrhmchd.gov.in.
